title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bank of India Holdings Services - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bank of India Holdings Services - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Bank of India Holdings Services invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Noida location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bank of India Holdings Services:
Bank of India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bank of India Holdings Services!
